title: Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Financial Results

Q4 2021 Performance

Revenue increased 42% to $1.3 billion in Q4 2021, compared to the prior year. Daily active users reached 319 million, an increase of 54 million or 20% year-over-year. Net income was $23 million, representing the first quarter of positive net income since going public in 2017.

Full Year 2021 Results

For full year 2021, revenue increased 64% to $4.1 billion, compared to the prior year. The company achieved its second consecutive year of positive adjusted EBITDA of $617 million and its first full year of positive operating cash flow and free cash flow of $293 million and $223 million respectively.

User Growth Highlights

The rest of the world segment showed particularly strong growth, with 40 million new users added in Q4 alone, representing regional expansion outside North America and Europe.

Forward Outlook

Management provided guidance for Q1 2022 revenue of $1.03-1.08 billion and adjusted EBITDA of approximately breakeven, citing uncertainties from Apple's iOS privacy changes.
